历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 5700 → 6263 → 4894 → 4759 → 4527, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. In the past 3 years, it has continuously moved forward from 6263 to 4527, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1736 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4527. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 704 in 2021 → 659 in 2022 → 625 in 2023 → 592 in 2024 → 613 in 2025. In recent years, there has been a slight reduction in enrollment, with a slight rebound in 2025. The 2026 plan is 645 students, an increase of about 5.2% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 33rd, and has been stable in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving 2 incidents (difficulty identification controversy, teacher ethics), but attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. In 2022, there was a signal of a gap in attention, but no obvious anomalies have occurred in recent years. Disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above. These are highly matched with the university's core enrollment majors such as electronic information and computer science, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly popular and recommended, attracting a large number of high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 462,767), significantly intensifying competition. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and as a provincial 985 university, it has strong regional appeal for local candidates. In 2025, the university enrolled 613 students in the physics category in Sichuan Province, accounting for a relatively high proportion of the university's total national enrollment that year, with stable provincial enrollment share.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 4527, an enrollment expansion of about 5.2% in 2026, a significant increase of about 15.6% in the total number of provincial candidates leading to intensified competition, high social popularity of core majors (computer/electronic information) attracting high-scoring candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation but limited impact, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4619, with a range of 4119–5119.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4119), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Everest Plan, UESTC Talent Plan). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5119), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors such as Software Engineering, while also considering mid-level Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 电子科技大学医学类在四川省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年44135名（计划12人，含临床医学与护理学）、2022年6263名（计划15人，仅临床医学）、2023年6345名（计划 16人）、2024年7109名（计划16人）、2025年7273名（计划16人）。2021年因首次以医学类单独招生且包含护理学，位次异常偏低；2022年起仅保留临床医学专业后位次大幅跃升 至6000余名，此后逐年小幅走低（更难进）。2026年招生计划维持16人不变，与2025年持平，供需弹性为零，但近年持续下降的趋势表明竞争仍在加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选国家『双一流』建设高校（A类），位于四川省成都市。学校以电子信息为核心 特色，医学学科虽非传统优势，但依托学校强大的理工科背景和985平台，临床医学专业具备较高的培养起点和就业竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续上升，电子科技大学地处成都这一西南医疗中心，拥有华西医院等优质医疗资源，对省内考生吸引力较强。四川省内医学类招生 规模整体有限，电子科大医学类仅设临床医学一个专业且计划仅16人，供给稀缺进一步推高了竞争激烈程度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性与近年位次持续走低的趋势，预测2026年电子科技大学医学类最低录取位次约为7353名，较2025年继续小幅下降（更难进），波动区间为7153至7553名。建议考生 参考此区间进行志愿填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for the medical category at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Sichuan Province over the past five years are: 44,135 in 2021 (planned enrollment of 12, including clinical medicine and nursing), 6,263 in 2022 (planned enrollment of 15, clinical medicine only), 6,345 in 2023 (planned enrollment of 16), 7,109 in 2024 (planned enrollment of 16), and 7,273 in 2025 (planned enrollment of 16). In 2021, due to the first-time separate enrollment for the medical category including nursing, the ranking was abnormally low; from 2022 onwards, with only clinical medicine retained, the ranking surged to over 6,000 and has since declined slightly year by year (becoming harder to enter). The 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged at 16, consistent with 2025, with zero supply-demand elasticity, but the continuous downward trend in recent years indicates intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A), located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. The university is centered on electronic information as its core feature. Although medical disciplines are not traditionally strong, relying on the university's strong science and engineering background and 985 platform, the clinical medicine program has a high training starting point and employment competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The clinical medicine program has seen a continuous rise in national application popularity in recent years. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, a southwestern medical center, with access to high-quality medical resources such as West China Hospital, making it highly attractive to provincial candidates. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Sichuan Province is limited, and the university's medical category only offers clinical medicine with a planned enrollment of just 16, with scarce supply further driving up competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive supply-demand elasticity and the continuous downward trend in rankings in recent years, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the medical category at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in 2026 will be approximately 7,353, continuing a slight decline from 2025 (becoming harder to enter), with a fluctuation range of 7,153 to 7,553. Candidates are advised to refer to this range for volunteer application.

(No separate enrollment program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The medical category at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only enrolls for the clinical medicine program in Sichuan Province, with a planned enrollment of 16. Candidates within the predicted ranking range can actively apply, and it is recommended to take clinical medicine as the main target while also considering medical programs at other institutions as backups.
